nasb.text: Again a voice came to him a second time, “What God has cleansed, no longer consider unholy.”

esv.text: And the voice came to him again a second time, “What God has made clean, do not call common.”

cnv.text: 第二次又有聲音對他說：“　神所潔淨的，你不可當作俗物。”

ccb.text: 那声音又一次对他说：“上帝已经洁净的，你不可再称之为不洁净。”

csbs.text: 那声音第二次又对他说：“神所洁净的，你不可当做污秽的。”
